name: eff-firegrid
description: F#/Fable bindings + playground for the S2 (s2.dev) streaming SDK

scripts.test: dotnet fable tests/Suite.fsx --outDir build_test && node build_test/Suite.js
scripts.format: dotnet fantomas src tests benchmarks repl.fsx
scripts.format:check: dotnet fantomas --check src tests benchmarks repl.fsx
scripts.bench: dotnet fable benchmarks/Micro.fsx --outDir build_bench && node build_bench/Micro.js
scripts.bench:e2e: dotnet fable benchmarks/Throughput.fsx --outDir build_bench && node build_bench/Throughput.js
